title: Handle livestock using basic techniques
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Handle livestock using basic techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to handle livestock

pcs.text: Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss work requirements with supervisor and seek clarification where necessary.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Identify, prepare and maintain livestock handling areas, gates and access routes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, prepare and maintain livestock handling areas, gates and access routes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, prepare and maintain livestock handling areas, gates and access routes.

pcs.text: Prepare and use handling equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and use handling equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and use handling equipment according to supervisor instructions and safe working practices.

pcs.text: Check and report missing, faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and report missing, faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and report missing, faulty or unsafe tools, equipment or PPE to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to handle livestock

elements.title: Handle livestock

pcs.text: Locate and identify livestock for handling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and identify livestock for handling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and identify livestock for handling.

pcs.text: Observe and anticipate behavioural characteristics of livestock and use appropriate handling methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe and anticipate behavioural characteristics of livestock and use appropriate handling methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe and anticipate behavioural characteristics of livestock and use appropriate handling methods.

pcs.text: Move livestock to designated handling areas and carry out procedures to control, draft and sort livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move livestock to designated handling areas and carry out procedures to control, draft and sort livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move livestock to designated handling areas and carry out procedures to control, draft and sort livestock using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Carry out restraint procedures safely and with minimum stress and discomfort to livestock according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out restraint procedures safely and with minimum stress and discomfort to livestock according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out restraint procedures safely and with minimum stress and discomfort to livestock according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Monitor and anticipate livestock behaviour during moving and drafting processes to ensure wellbeing of livestock and safety of handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and anticipate livestock behaviour during moving and drafting processes to ensure wellbeing of livestock and safety of handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and anticipate livestock behaviour during moving and drafting processes to ensure wellbeing of livestock and safety of handlers.

pcs.text: Conduct count or tally of livestock numbers and record or report as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct count or tally of livestock numbers and record or report as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct count or tally of livestock numbers and record or report as required.

pcs.text: Identify environmental implications associated with livestock production and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental implications associated with livestock production and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental implications associated with livestock production and report to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Handle livestock

elements.title: Complete handling procedure

pcs.text: Confirm livestock dispersal plan with supervisor as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm livestock dispersal plan with supervisor as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm livestock dispersal plan with supervisor as required.

pcs.text: Prepare gates and access routes for livestock departure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare gates and access routes for livestock departure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare gates and access routes for livestock departure.

pcs.text: Move livestock to designated areas using good stock handling techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Move livestock to designated areas using good stock handling techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Move livestock to designated areas using good stock handling techniques.

pcs.text: Ensure adequate clean water and feed at destination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure adequate clean water and feed at destination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure adequate clean water and feed at destination.

pcs.text: Dispose of livestock residues and waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of livestock residues and waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of livestock residues and waste according to environmental practices and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Clean and maintain handling areas and equipment, and store equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and maintain handling areas and equipment, and store equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and maintain handling areas and equipment, and store equipment and materials according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Report work outcomes, handling area maintenance requirements, and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report work outcomes, handling area maintenance requirements, and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report work outcomes, handling area maintenance requirements, and faults, wear or damage of equipment to supervisor.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
